articles.headline: Google reveals it holds $94.1bn in SpaceX shares after the IPO
articles.summary: Google spent years as a low-key backer of SpaceX. This week it showed what that patience is worth. In a quarterly filing, Alphabet said its Google unit holds $94.1bn in SpaceX shares, following the rocket company’s record IPO. Google was an early investor, an…

articles.headline: SpaceX surpasses Meta’s market cap after historic IPO debut
articles.summary:
SpaceX debuted on Nasdaq at $1.77 trillion and surged past Meta's $1.45 trillion valuation, reshaping the U.S. equity market hierarchy.
